games.name: Oswald's Diary
games.subtitle: Jack Martin
games.description:
On August 9th, 1963, a well traveled 23-year-old man was arrested in New Orleans for disturbing the peace.

3 months later he was arrested in Dallas, and immediately became the presumptive assassin of President John F. Kennedy.

2 days later he too was fatally shot.

That young man was Lee Oswald.

Those are facts.

From here on out, anything you discover may be fact, or it may be fiction.

That’s for you to decipher.

You’ve found Oswald’s Diary.

Your mission is to take it to the city where he was born and get it into the right hands before it’s too late.
games.price: Free to Start / $14.99 in game purchase

games.name: Arizona Cardinals in New Orleans
games.subtitle: Coach Smith
games.description: A tour of New Orleans for fans of the Arizona Cardinals.

games.name: Florida State University Fans Takeover New Orleans
games.subtitle: Chief Wahoo

games.name: This Must Be The Place: New Orleans Edition
games.subtitle: Nigel
games.description:
A Rock & Roll Adventure Through the Birthplace of Jazz in New Orleans.

Navigate the French Quarter and beyond, discovering the iconic locations tied to rock and jazz legends who shaped the sound of a city unlike any other.

games.name: Hollywood South
games.subtitle: The Producer
games.price: Free To Start / In App Purchases
games.description: You play the part of a struggling young movie director. Lead your cast and crew around New Orleans to solve the clues found in ‘Katrina Returns’, a screenplay for a movie that’s so bad it’s destined for the DVD bin of your local dollar store.

games.name: CBD Passport
games.subtitle: Catherine
games.description: Text back and forth with us to get your CBD Passport stamped. Visit 5 businesses in the neighborhood and get entered into a drawing for a $500 gift certificate.
